examples: Miss Abbot turned to divest a stout leg of the necessary ligature.
Ligature glyph widths are divided evenly among the characters they represent.
The rate of mast cell degranulation was studied on ligature marks of human skin.
He was found hanging from a ligature in his single cell by staff at 0550 BST.
Injuries to the front of her neck suggested a "soft ligature" had been used.
